success_criteria: Agent verifies identity (email + order), then directs to Account > Settings self-serve; ticket only if self-serve impossible.

customer_msg: Hi, I need to change the email on my account - I'm moving off this address soon. It's sarah.kim@example.com, and my order O1003 can verify me.
agent_msg: Hi Sarah! Thanks for reaching out. I see you're verified with order O1003. Unfortunately, your order has already been delivered, so I can't change the email on the order itself. However, you can update your account email address yourself by going to Account → Settings. If you need help with that, let me know!
